test_levels.purpose: Verify a narrow rule or transformation in isolation.
test_levels.openclaw_review_prompt: Check whether the single rule being tested behaves exactly as declared, without relying on broader workflow assumptions.

test_levels.purpose: Verify multiple graph-task components working together through the CLI/skill flow.
test_levels.openclaw_review_prompt: Check whether the connected steps preserve graph semantics, produce the expected transition sequence, and leave inspectable artifacts.

test_levels.purpose: Verify behavior in a bounded realistic scenario with either a human or automation loop involved.
test_levels.openclaw_review_prompt: Check whether the system behaves honestly end-to-end under realistic constraints, including escalation, ambiguity handling, and completion semantics.
